name: Galaga
description: Galaga is a fixed shooter arcade game where the player controls a spaceship at the bottom of the screen. The game area is a rectangular field where enemy aliens fly in formation from the top of the screen. The aliens have various movement patterns, generally diving down towards the player's ship and attempting to collide with it or fire projectiles. The player must maneuver their ship horizontally to dodge enemy fire and alien attacks, while simultaneously firing back at the aliens to destroy them. The player starts with one ship, but can potentially gain a second ship by allowing an alien boss (a 'Galaga' alien) to capture the player's ship with a tractor beam. The player can then rescue the captured ship and merge it with their current ship, forming a dual fighter with double firepower but a larger target area. The game progresses in waves. Each wave consists of the alien formation, their attack runs, and the subsequent clearing of the screen. After several waves, there is a challenging stage. The game ends when the player loses all their ships.

controls.arrow_left: Move player ship to the left
controls.arrow_right: Move player ship to the right
